ecb.description: SEC. 28-105.11 THE BUILDING PERMIT OR COPY SHALL BE POSTED AT THE WORKSITE,VISIBLE TO THE PUBLIC. NOTED: NO PERMIT FOR SIDEWALK SHED POSTED AT TIME OF INSPECTION SHED INSTALLED AT EXPOSURE #1. REMEDY: COMPLY W/
FAILURE TO PROVIDE REQUIRED SIGNAGE & INFORMATION ON SIDEWALK SHED. NOTED: MISSING PERMIT # & EXPIRATION DATE ON SIDEWALK SHED SIGN. REMEDY:COMPLY WITH CODE.
FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BLDG WALL(S) OR APPURTENANCES. NOTED: LOOSE & DEFECTIVE BRICKS ON FRONT FACADE OF BLDG. NOTED LOCATIONS: CORNER OF ROOF LEVEL & 2ND STY. REMEDY: MAINTAIN EXTERIOR BLDG WALL.
SIDEWALK SHED DOES NOT MEET CODE SPECIFICATIONS. NOTED: NO ELECTRIC LIGHTING UNDER SHED AT TIME OF INSPECTION. REMEDY: CONFORM SHED TO CODE SPECIFICATIONS.

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COMPLAINT MANNER. NOTED: 4'X 8' PLYWOOD SHEETS,BEING USED TO "BOARD UP" BLDG AT STALLED CONSTRUCTION SITE,ARE LOOSE & BEING KEPT IN PLACE,TEMPORARILY BY PIECES OF WOOD. THIS
JOB SITE FENCE NOT CONSTRUCTED PURSUANT TO SUBSECTION. NOTED: SECTION OF FENCE,LOCATED AT WESTERN SIDE,IS LOOSE & STRUCTURALLY UNSTABLE. REMEDY: REPAIR &/OR REPLACE FENCE.

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN EXTERIOR WALL OF BLDG.NOTE:WEST ELEVATON OF 3STY BLDG IS TILTING & BRICK APPEARS TO BE LOOSE & IS FALLING INTO ADJ PROPERTY #254-58 ST.NICHOLAS AVE.ALSO THE FACADE @ SOUTH & NORTH ELEV IS IN
UNLAWFULLY CONTINUED WORK WHILE ON NOTICE OF A STOP WORK ORDER. REMOVED ALL EQUIPMENT OFF JOB SITE. (ROPE SCAFFOLD).
FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BLDG WALLS OR APPURTENANCES. DEFECTS NOTED: AT FRONT WALL (EXP #1) BROKEN AND LOOSE BRICKS IN DANGER TO COLLAPSE AT ROOFAND 3RD FLR. REMEDY: REPAIR DEFECTS PROVIDE SIDEWALK SHED.
FAILURE TO COMPLY W/ THE COMMISSIONER'S ORDER TO FILE A COFC W/ THE DOB FOR VIOLATING CONDITIONS CITED IN NOTICE OF VI. # 090606C10EQU/34538463M REMEDY:FILE COFC
SUPERVISION OR USE OF RIGGING EQUIPMENT W/O A RIGGERS LICENSE. 1-NO LICENSE RIGGERS ON SITE.REMEDY:OBTAIN LICENSE.
FAILED TO OBTAIN A TEMPORARY CONSTRUCTION PERMIT PRIOR TO INSTALLATION/USE OF SIDEWALK SHED.1-NO PERMIT FOR SIDEWALK SHED.REMEDY:OBTAIN TEMPORARY CONSTRUCTION PERMIT.

WORK W/O A PERMIT EXPIRED PERMIT 4 WORKERS AT SITE 2 INSIDE PERMIT #104466061 EXPIRED 4/12/08 WORK IN PROGRESS AT TIME OF INSPECTION. REMEDYSTOP ALL WORK EXCEPT TO MAKE SAFE. OBTAIN PERMIT - PROVIDE SAFETY FEAT

FAILURE TO INSTITUTE/MAINTAIN SAFETY EQUIPMENT MEASURES OR TEMPORARY CONSTRUCTION NOTED: NEW STEEL STAIRS INSTALLED IN BUILDING NO TEMPORARYGUARD RAILS INSTALLED CAUSING A FALL HAZARD FROM BASEMENT TO 3RD FLR.
